failedAssertions.reason: Representative source-level naming bridge fails because `mux.handle_func(...)` is rejected with `no method 'handle_func' on type http::ServeMux`.
A single program that combines `use net::http`, snake_case stdlib calls, PascalCase stdlib types, and `mux.handle_func(...)` fails because `http::ServeMux` has no `handle_func` method.

appliedUpdates.description: Added an explicit Flow Validator Guidance section for the `rgoc` CLI + generated Go artifacts surface so serial import-surface validation has a named guidance section and evidence/output rules.
